ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the item is intended */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the item is intended */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the clothing item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Measurement for bust in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Measurement for waist in inches */,
  "hips" REAL /* Measurement for hips in inches */,
  "dress_length" REAL /* Measurement for dress length in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Measurement for shoulder width in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Measurement for sleeve length in inches */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size chart is applicable */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit */,
  "size_chart_image" TEXT /* URL to an image of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the inventory is located */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the inventory entry was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit from 1 to 5 */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit from 1 to 5 */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comfort from 1 to 5 */,
  "style_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the style from 1 to 5 */,
  "fit_issue" TEXT /* Specific issue with the fit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer became a member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of items sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the sale was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the return occurred */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* More detailed reason for the return */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the return was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the return record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size adjustment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "original_measurement" REAL /* Original measurement before adjustment */,
  "adjusted_measurement" REAL /* Adjusted measurement after feedback */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the adjustment was made */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit for which the adjustment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_adjustments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)
